title: Blog | Snurblog — Axel Bruns
snippet: A blog post from June 8, 2026, by Axel Bruns, mentions Fabio Giglietto presenting a paper on 'partisan alignment, journalistic quality, and algorithmic amplification on Facebook' at the 2026 International Communication Association conference in Cape Town.
description: A blog post by Axel Bruns from June 2026 mentions Fabio Giglietto presenting a paper on partisan alignment, journalistic quality, and algorithmic amplification on Facebook at the International Communication Association conference.

title: How Facebook's Algorithmic Tweaks Affected Engagement with News URLs over Time
snippet: A blog post by Axel Bruns liveblogging a session at the 2026 International Communication Association (ICA) conference in Cape Town, where Fabio Giglietto presented a paper. The paper focuses on partisan alignment, journalistic quality, and algorithmic amplification on Facebook, examining how URLs shared on the platform reach audiences of vastly different sizes.
description: A blog post liveblogging a session at the 2026 ICA conference, discussing Fabio Giglietto's paper on algorithmic amplification, partisan alignment, and journalistic quality on Facebook.
